current_accuracy.1d: 48.5% -- BELOW coin flip, actively destroying value
current_accuracy.verdict: System is net-negative on ETH. Signals worse than random.

why_eth_is_hard_to_predict: Layer 2 value leakage: 60%+ of tx volume now on L2s, base-layer fees down 62% YoY. ETH token value accrual is structurally broken vs BTC fixed-supply narrative
ETH/BTC ratio at 0.031, near 5-year lows (0.028 Feb 2026). Prolonged structural decline since 0.08 peak in 2021. Capital rotation away from ETH to BTC ETFs
Dual identity problem: ETH is simultaneously ultrasound money AND programmable infrastructure. Market cannot price both narratives consistently
New L2 launched every ~19 days. Liquidity fragmentation makes price discovery chaotic -- each L2 siphons activity and fees from mainnet
Staking yield compressed to 2.8-3.3% APR (from 5%+ in 2023) as 30% of supply now staked. Lower yield = less demand driver
Whale vs retail divergence: whales reducing OI and increasing shorts while retail buying -- creates erratic two-way flow that defeats momentum signals
Gas fee collapse post-Dencun: stablecoin transfer volume fell 42.6%, fees dropped 50%. More transactions but less economic weight -- volume signals unreliable
ETF flow volatility: Q3 2025 ETH ETF inflows outpaced BTC for first time ($9.6B), but flows are lumpy and regime-dependent

key_predictive_features_for_eth.rationale: Ratio at 0.031 is a rotation signal. When ratio rebounds from extreme lows (0.028), ETH outperforms. When ratio breaks lower, ETH enters death spiral. More predictive than absolute price.
key_predictive_features_for_eth.data_source: Binance ETHBTC pair or derive from ETHUSDT/BTCUSDT
key_predictive_features_for_eth.priority: HIGH -- our system completely ignores this

key_predictive_features_for_eth.rationale: Institutional ETH flows are lumpy but directionally predictive. $187M weekly inflows correlate with outperformance. Outflows precede drops. Q3 2025 saw $9.6B quarterly.
key_predictive_features_for_eth.data_source: CoinGlass ETH ETF flow data, SoSoValue
key_predictive_features_for_eth.priority: HIGH -- strongest institutional signal for ETH specifically

key_predictive_features_for_eth.rationale: TVL rose from 25M to 31M ETH in 2025. TVL increases precede ETH rallies. TVL in ETH terms (not USD) removes BTC/USD correlation noise.
key_predictive_features_for_eth.priority: MEDIUM -- leading indicator for ETH network demand

key_predictive_features_for_eth.rationale: Entry queue holding 1.3M ETH while exit queue nearly vanished (32 ETH in Dec 2025). Net staking demand is supply-reducing and bullish.
Our system has funding_rate signal at 74.2% on 3h for BTC. ETH funding rate behaves differently -- whale short positioning diverges from BTC. Need ETH-specific funding.
key_predictive_features_for_eth.priority: HIGH -- we already have the infra, just need ETH-specific tracking

key_predictive_features_for_eth.feature: L2 fee revenue ratio (L2 fees / L1 fees)
key_predictive_features_for_eth.rationale: When L2s capture increasing share of fee revenue, ETH mainnet value accrual weakens. Rising ratio = bearish for ETH price. Currently L1 revenue collapsed from $100M/mo to $15M/mo.
key_predictive_features_for_eth.priority: LOW -- slow-moving, more structural than tactical

key_predictive_features_for_eth.rationale: Whales increased shorts in Apr 2026 while retail bought. Deeply negative whale-retail delta preceded drops. Track via exchange flows by wallet size.

on_chain_metrics_most_predictive: ETH exchange netflow (outflow = bullish accumulation, inflow = distribution)
ETH staking rate change (accelerating staking = supply squeeze)
Smart contract gas consumption (proxy for real usage vs speculation)
ETH burned (EIP-1559) -- but declining post-Dencun, losing predictive power

cross_asset_correlations.BTC: Strong positive (~0.8-0.9) but decoupling in 2026. ETH/BTC ratio declining means ETH underperforms even when BTC rallies.
cross_asset_correlations.DXY: Moderate negative -- same as BTC but weaker signal for ETH specifically
cross_asset_correlations.SPX: Moderate positive in risk-on. ETH is more risk-on than BTC.
cross_asset_correlations.DeFi_TVL: Leading indicator. TVL rises precede ETH price rises by 1-2 weeks.
cross_asset_correlations.ETH_ETF_flows: Strong directional signal. Weekly $187M+ inflows = bullish.

recommended_new_signals: eth_btc_ratio_momentum -- ETH/BTC 20-period rate of change. Most important missing signal.
eth_etf_flows -- Daily net ETH ETF inflow/outflow from CoinGlass/SoSoValue
eth_defi_tvl_delta -- Weekly TVL change in ETH terms from DefiLlama
eth_staking_queue -- Net staking demand (entry - exit queue) from beaconcha.in
eth_whale_flow -- Large wallet (>10K ETH) net positioning
deep_dives.implementation_notes: ETH at 48.5% 1d is destroying value. Root cause: system treats ETH like BTC but ETH has unique drivers (L2 leakage, staking dynamics, DeFi TVL). The ETH/BTC ratio is the single most important missing feature -- it captures relative rotation that our absolute-price signals miss entirely. ETH funding rate should be tracked separately from BTC (currently lumped together in futures_flow signal). Priority fix: add eth_btc_ratio_momentum signal, then eth_etf_flows.

current_accuracy.verdict: System is net-negative on MSTR. Using generic signals on a BTC-leveraged equity is fundamentally wrong.

btc_mstr_correlation.current_correlation: 0.58 (12-month daily), up from long-term average of 0.26

beta_profile_2026.upside_beta: ~3x (44% MSTR gain vs 15% BTC gain, Feb-Mar 2026)
beta_profile_2026.downside_beta: ~0.4x (compressed in 2026 downturn, absorbed <50% of BTC drops)

btc_mstr_correlation.lead_lag: BTC leads, MSTR lags by minutes to hours in crypto sessions. But MSTR can gap at US equity open, creating apparent leads. During market hours MSTR amplifies BTC moves.
btc_mstr_correlation.key_insight: MSTR is NOT a simple BTC proxy. It has asymmetric beta -- 3x up, 0.4x down in current regime. This asymmetry shifts with mNAV premium level.

additional_factors_beyond_btc.predictive_power: HIGH -- When mNAV < 1.0x, MSTR is cheap vs its BTC. Dec 2025 hit 0.92x = strong buy. When mNAV > 2.0x, equity dilution risk reprices.
additional_factors_beyond_btc.how_to_get: MSTR market cap / (BTC holdings * BTC price). Strategy.com publishes BTC count.

additional_factors_beyond_btc.predictive_power: MEDIUM -- Measures Saylor dilution efficiency. Positive BTC Yield means dilution is BTC-accretive. Turning negative = major sell signal.
additional_factors_beyond_btc.how_to_get: Quarterly disclosure or calculate from share count + BTC holdings

additional_factors_beyond_btc.current_value: $25.3B raised in 2025 alone. 815,061 BTC held as of Apr 2026.
additional_factors_beyond_btc.predictive_power: HIGH -- ATM offerings cause short-term dilution pressure. Convertible note issuance at high mNAV = bearish signal. But BTC purchases announced = bullish.
LOW (short-term) -- Matters when BTC drops near conversion thresholds. At current BTC ~$75K, well above conversion prices.

additional_factors_beyond_btc.factor: US equity market hours vs crypto 24/7
additional_factors_beyond_btc.predictive_power: MEDIUM -- BTC overnight moves create gap risk. Pre-market/after-hours indicate opening direction.

should_we_use_btc_signals_for_mstr.answer: Partially yes, but with critical modifications
reasoning: BTC direction is the dominant driver (~58% correlation). BTC signals should have 60-70% weight.
BUT: mNAV premium/discount is MSTR-specific and highly predictive. Must be added.
BUT: Equity dilution events (ATM offerings) cause MSTR-specific selloffs unrelated to BTC.
BUT: Asymmetric beta means BTC SELL signals should be weighted differently than BTC BUY signals for MSTR.
BUT: US market hours mean MSTR misses 16h/day of BTC price action. Gap analysis needed.
Recommendation: Use BTC signals as base, overlay mNAV premium signal, and adjust for asymmetric beta regime.

recommended_new_signals: mstr_mnav_premium -- Market cap / (BTC_holdings * BTC_price). Buy < 1.0x, caution > 2.0x.
mstr_btc_gap -- Overnight BTC % change during MSTR non-trading hours. Predicts opening gap direction.
mstr_equity_issuance -- Binary flag for recent ATM offering / convertible issuance. Short-term bearish.
mstr_btc_beta_regime -- Rolling 30d upside/downside beta. Currently 3x up / 0.4x down.
btc_signals_weighted -- Use existing BTC signals but weight 60-70% (not 100%) for MSTR decisions
deep_dives.implementation_notes: MSTR at 49.4% 1d is almost exactly coin flip -- signals add zero value. Root cause: system applies generic stock signals (RSI, MACD, EMA on MSTR price) which are meaningless for a BTC-leveraged treasury company. MSTR price is ~60% BTC, ~20% mNAV sentiment, ~10% equity dilution, ~10% market beta. Fix: (1) Create mstr_mnav_premium signal using BTC price + MSTR market cap. (2) Weight BTC signals 60-70% for MSTR. (3) Add gap analysis for overnight BTC moves. The mNAV is THE key -- at 0.92x in Dec 2025 it was a screaming buy, at 2.8x in late 2024 it was a clear sell.

current_accuracy.best_signal: funding_rate at 74.2% (3h, 535 samples) -- our star signal
current_accuracy.verdict: BTC consensus is weak because good signals (funding 74.2%) are diluted by bad signals in voting. Not a feature problem -- a weighting problem.

MVRV_Z_Score.how_it_works: Market Value / Realized Value. Above 3.5 = every major cycle top in history. Current ~1.2 (accumulation zone). 7/7 positive 12-month returns when MVRV in 1.0-1.5 band since 2013.
MVRV_Z_Score.our_status: On-chain signal active, 60% accuracy with 45 samples. Needs STH-SOPR and hash price additions.
MVRV_Z_Score.verdict: Excellent macro signal but useless for our 3h/1d horizons. Should only activate on 5d+ timeframes.

SOPR.accuracy_claim: STH-SOPR (Short-Term Holder) is the most actionable variant
SOPR.how_it_works: Spent Output Profit Ratio. Below 1.0 = loss-taking capitulation (often bottoms). Above 1.05+ = profit-taking (often tops).
SOPR.our_status: NOT tracked separately. Lumped into on-chain signal.
SOPR.verdict: STH-SOPR should be a standalone signal. Currently 0.92-0.96 = loss selling = accumulation zone.

Exchange_Flows.accuracy_claim: Exchange reserves at 7-year low (2.21M BTC). Sustained outflow = bullish.
Exchange_Flows.how_it_works: Net exchange inflow/outflow. Large inflows = potential sell pressure. Outflows = accumulation.
Exchange_Flows.our_status: We track exchange netflow in on-chain signal but sample size tiny (45).
Exchange_Flows.verdict: Need to separate exchange flow rate-of-change as standalone signal. Weekly delta more predictive than absolute level.

Hash_Price.accuracy_claim: Near ATL in 2026 -- historically marks accumulation zones
Hash_Price.how_it_works: Revenue per TH/s. When miners are barely profitable, weak miners capitulate = supply squeeze follows.

funding_rate_deep_dive.our_accuracy: 74.2% at 3h (535 samples) -- best signal in entire system for BTC
funding_rate_deep_dive.why_it_works: High positive funding = crowded longs paying premium = mean-reversion SHORT signal. High negative = crowded shorts = mean-reversion LONG. Our 3h horizon perfectly captures the funding-driven reversion.
limitations: Funding alone is not a reliable directional predictor in trending markets -- can stay positive for weeks in bull runs
Most effective when combined with OI (open interest). High funding + high OI = crowded trade about to unwind
Professional delta-neutral strategies captured 19.26% annual returns in 2025 using funding arbitrage
Works best as contrarian signal at extremes, not for trend-following
funding_rate_deep_dive.enhancement: Combine funding rate with OI change rate. When funding is extreme AND OI is declining, the crowded trade is already unwinding = strongest signal.
funding_rate_deep_dive.our_status: Active and excellent. Horizon-gated to 3h/4h only. Should remain gated -- funding reverts in hours, not days.

put_call_ratio.how_it_works: Ratio of put OI to call OI. Below 0.4 = extremely bullish positioning (Dec 2025 was 0.38). Above 0.7 = bearish hedging.
put_call_ratio.predictive_power: Contrarian at extremes. Extreme call skew (low P/C) preceded corrections. Extreme put skew preceded rallies.
put_call_ratio.our_status: NOT tracked. Recommended in yesterday research but not implemented.

options_skew_25delta.how_it_works: 25-delta call IV minus 25-delta put IV. Negative = traders paying more for downside protection.
options_skew_25delta.predictive_power: Leading indicator for directional moves. Negative skew in early 2026 preceded continued pressure.

max_pain_levels.how_it_works: Strike price where most options expire worthless. BTC gravitates toward max pain near expiry.
max_pain_levels.predictive_power: Strong on expiry weeks (monthly/quarterly). Quarterly expiries move $2-5B in OI.
max_pain_levels.our_status: NOT tracked. Could combine with our calendar signal for expiry week warnings.

cross_asset_correlations.SPX: Moderate positive in risk-on (0.4-0.6). Weakening in 2026.
cross_asset_correlations.XAU_USD: Weak positive via safe-haven overlap. BTC increasingly treated as digital gold.
cross_asset_correlations.DXY: Moderate negative (-0.3 to -0.5). Dollar strength = BTC weakness.
cross_asset_correlations.ETH: Strong positive (0.8-0.9) but ETH/BTC ratio declining = ETH underperforming.
cross_asset_correlations.MSTR: Very strong positive (0.58 daily, higher intraday). MSTR amplifies BTC.

recommended_new_signals: btc_sth_sopr -- Short-term holder SOPR as standalone. Below 1.0 = capitulation buy. Above 1.05 = take profit.
btc_exchange_flow_delta -- Weekly rate of change of exchange reserves. Outflow acceleration = bullish.
btc_options_skew -- 25-delta skew from Deribit. Contrarian at extremes.
btc_options_pcr -- Put/call ratio. Below 0.4 = contrarian bearish, above 0.7 = contrarian bullish.
btc_funding_x_oi -- Combine funding rate with OI change rate. Extreme funding + declining OI = strongest reversion signal.
btc_hash_price -- Miner revenue per TH/s. Near ATL = macro accumulation zone. 5d+ only.
btc_etf_flows -- Daily BTC ETF net inflow/outflow. $325M+ daily = directional.
deep_dives.implementation_notes: BTC at 52.7% 1d is weak but salvageable. The problem is NOT lack of good signals -- funding rate is 74.2% at 3h. The problem is signal DILUTION: 33 active signals vote equally, so funding 74.2% is diluted by 20+ signals at 50%. Fix priority: (1) IC-weighted voting (already in quant research plan) would let funding dominate. (2) Add btc_funding_x_oi to amplify our best signal. (3) Add options skew/PCR for medium-term direction. (4) Separate STH-SOPR from on-chain bundle. The multi-signal on-chain framework claims 84.3% macro accuracy -- but only on longer timeframes. Our 3h/1d horizons need funding + options + short-term flow signals, not macro on-chain.

cross_cutting_insights.signal_dilution_is_the_core_problem: All three tickers suffer from the same root cause: equal-weight voting across 33 signals dilutes the few good signals (funding 74.2%) with many coin-flip signals. IC-weighted voting would fix this systemically.

missing_asset_specific_signals.ETH: ETH/BTC ratio momentum, ETH ETF flows, DeFi TVL delta, staking queue
missing_asset_specific_signals.MSTR: mNAV premium/discount, BTC gap analysis, equity dilution events, asymmetric beta regime
missing_asset_specific_signals.BTC: STH-SOPR (standalone), options skew, put/call ratio, funding x OI composite, ETF flows

cross_cutting_insights.timeframe_mismatch: On-chain metrics (MVRV, SOPR, exchange flows) are macro signals (5d+). Our system evaluates them at 3h/1d where they add noise. Need strict timeframe gating.
research_papers_consensus: XGBoost and Random Forest consistently outperform for crypto direction prediction
Transformer models with technical indicators outperform LSTM
Multi-signal frameworks (84.3% accuracy) dramatically outperform single metrics (23% improvement)
Volume and technical indicators have 1-2 day impact; macro/sentiment has 1-2 week impact
SMOTE for class imbalance + feature normalization are critical preprocessing steps
priority_actions: 1. Implement IC-weighted voting to stop signal dilution (biggest single improvement, already planned)
2. Add ETH/BTC ratio momentum signal (highest impact for ETH, trivial to implement)
3. Add mNAV premium signal for MSTR (highest impact for MSTR, needs market cap data)
4. Create btc_funding_x_oi composite signal (amplifies our best signal)
5. Add options skew/PCR from Deribit (new data source, medium effort)
6. Separate STH-SOPR as standalone signal (restructure existing on-chain)
7. Add ETF flow signals for both BTC and ETH (new data source)
